description: As your trusted partner for fluid control solutions, China Topper Valve Manufacturer Co., Ltd was founded in Wenzhou, China in 1986. We operate a 62,000‑square‑meter production facility, supported by two modern subsidiary plants, a team of over 500 skilled professionals, and more than 200 units of state‑of‑the‑art manufacturing equipment. We specialize in delivering premium, tailored valve manufacturing solutions to global clients. All our valves are engineered in full adherence to major international standards including ANSI, API, BS, DIN, GOST and GB. Widely deployed across core industrial sectors such as oil & gas, petrochemicals, refining, general chemical processing, shipbuilding, power generation, and transmission pipelines, our products serve as the core component of industrial fluid control systems and underpin the reliable performance of your critical engineering projects. We uphold uncompromising standards for product quality and customer service through globally recognized accreditations. Our comprehensive certification portfolio covers ISO 9001 Quality Management, API, CE Mark, TS Level A1, ISO 14001 Environmental Management System, and OHS 45001 Occupational Health and Safety Management System. To drive continuous quality enhancement, we have established an in‑house professional testing institute. Leveraging sophisticated inspection technologies, we implement rigorous quality checks on every industrial valve manufactured onsite. This stringent testing ensures stable, long‑term operation across diverse working conditions, fully meeting your most stringent performance requirements. We sincerely anticipate building long‑term cooperative partnerships with you. China manufacturer offers high-quality industrial products with competitive pricing and advanced production capabilities.
